description: Market Data Features - Real-time Deriv.com volatility indices (V10, V25, V50, V75, V100) market overview with prices and trends

userStories.title: Update MarketOverview with real-time prices
userStories.description: As a trader, I need to see real-time market prices for all volatility indices.
acceptanceCriteria: Update MarketOverview to fetch from GET /markets/overview
Display all 5 markets: V10, V25, V50, V75, V100
Display current price with real-time updates
Add visual flash effect when price updates
Subscribe to market_update WebSocket events for instant updates
Verify in browser that markets display correctly
userStories.notes: Implemented - MarketOverview now fetches from GET /markets/overview, displays all 5 volatility indices with real-time prices via WebSocket and 3-second polling, includes flash effects, loading skeleton, error state with retry, 24h high/low, and market status indicators

userStories.title: Create MarketDetailModal component
userStories.description: As a trader, I need detailed view of a single market.
acceptanceCriteria: Display current price with large font
Display price change percentage with color coding
Verify in browser that modal displays correctly
userStories.notes: Successfully implemented MarketDetailModal component with all acceptance criteria met. Created src/components/dashboard/MarketDetailModal.tsx with modal displaying market symbol and name, current price with large font (text-5xl), price change percentage with color coding (green/red), sparkline chart using HTML5 Canvas for price visualization, 24h statistics grid (open, high, low, close), volatility index value, market spread, recent price updates (last 10) with timestamps, refresh button with spinner animation, close button, auto-refresh every 2 seconds using polling, and shadcn/ui Dialog components. Added fetchMarketDetail API function to src/lib/api/markets.ts. Added MarketDetailData, PriceUpdate, and MarketDetailResponse types to src/types/market.ts. Integrated modal into MarketOverview component with click handlers on market cards. Typecheck passes and build succeeds.

userStories.title: Add trend indicators to market cards
userStories.description: As a trader, I need to see market trend at a glance.
acceptanceCriteria: Add trend indicator badge to each market card
Display trend as: BULLISH, BEARISH, NEUTRAL
Add small sparkline chart showing recent price movement
Verify in browser that trends display correctly
userStories.notes: Successfully implemented trend indicators feature with all acceptance criteria met. Created TrendBadge component (src/components/dashboard/TrendBadge.tsx) displaying trend direction (BULLISH, BEARISH, NEUTRAL) with color coding (green/red/gray), trend strength (strong, moderate, weak), and integrated sparkline chart. Created TrendSparkline component (src/components/dashboard/TrendSparkline.tsx) using HTML5 Canvas for rendering price history with gradient fill. Added MarketTrendData, TrendStrength, and MarketTrendResponse types to src/types/market.ts. Added fetchMarketTrend API function to src/lib/api/markets.ts. Integrated trend fetching into MarketOverview component with 10-second refresh interval using TREND_REFRESH_INTERVAL constant. Implemented parallel trend fetching for all markets with loading skeleton states. Added tooltip with trend information including direction, strength, confidence score, and explanation of trend calculation using linear regression. Typecheck passes and build succeeds.
